scope: Targeted correction for biblical figures explicitly present in article text but missing from keyword fields.
policy: Use raw article text to detect exact biblical figure names.
Skip posts tagged Ignore so administrative posts do not become keyword-search hits.
Do not add a figure if the same figure or its variant is already present in themes, primaryKeywords, or secondaryKeywords.
Append figure names to secondaryKeywords without changing themes or primaryKeywords.
Exclude highly ambiguous one-word names from automatic addition unless represented by an exact multi-word form.
